title: V380 Arc-Reveal-Knowledge Feature Map
absorption_policy: Absorb concepts into V1700 code symbols and gates; do not wholesale-copy another model repository.

absorbed_features.runtime_value: Creates a four-act 16-episode season arc with deterministic tension targets.
Stores causal, foreshadow, callback, and emotional escalation edges.
Blocks premature direct reveal while allowing controlled foreshadowing.
Converts character knowledge status into prose-safe render constraints.
Folds reveal and knowledge constraints into the existing Node2 surface-only contract.
